programs.title: News
programs.desc: TRT World brings the latest news from around the globe, when it happens.

programs.title: The Longest Day: Land
programs.desc: We follow an Indonesian family from Sumba as they face food shortages, and Vietnamese farmers in the Mekong Delta as they find solutions to drought.

programs.title: Business News
programs.desc: As the world grapples with ever changing politics and crises, economy is always center stage. TRT World's Business News gives you the insight.

programs.title: The Newsmakers
programs.desc: With in-depth reports and strong, unfiltered debates: The Newsmakers examine the people and the stories that are shaping our lives.

programs.title: Newshour
programs.desc: TRT World brings the latest news from around the globe, when it happens.

programs.title: Nexus
programs.desc: TRT World's Nexus is a forensic, fast-paced and sometimes irreverent take on the news.
